query: Our LLM API calls are costing $8,000/month. We need to reduce token costs.
expected_behavior: Profiles current token usage before recommending any change: input tokens vs. output tokens, which calls are most expensive
Recommends semantic caching as the first structural fix (cache similar queries, not just identical ones)
Recommends model tiering: use a smaller/cheaper model for low-stakes requests and the expensive model only for complex tasks
Recommends payload reduction: audit system prompts for unnecessary verbosity
Provides a before/after cost estimate framework based on projected cache hit rate and tier split
